title: chrysopsis gossypina subsp. cruiseana
intro: Chrysopsis gossypina subsp. cruiseana is a plant species in the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the bushy yellowtop, with its distinctive yellow flowers and hairy foliage. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Chrysopsis gossypina subsp. cruiseana has been valued for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's medicinal properties can help alleviate various health issues, including digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy in folk medicine. Chrysopsis gossypina subsp. cruiseana can be prepared as a tea or infused oil to harness its medicinal benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
